text:
Market today: The mood is cautious, driven by geopolitical jitters and potential trade policy shifts. This impacts your concentrated tech/chip book directly.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL (down 38.35%) due to its leveraged nature and current status. SPAL is also a concern (down 49.42%) for the same reasons. Remember margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep an eye on Intel's foundry progress and any news related to chip stock sentiment.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and watching for signs of stabilization in the chip sector.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position given its significant loss and "SELL" status.
SPAL: Evaluate reducing exposure to this highly leveraged ETF due to its large unrealized loss.
NVDA: Watch the scanner entry (203.32-202.85) and stop (201.62) if you're looking for potential long-term tech exposure.
